title: hieracium murorum subsp. stenstroemii
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. stenstroemii, also known as Stenstroem's hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, and is believed to have medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Hieracium murorum subsp. stenstroemii is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
